response.global_analysis: Audio features a full performance of 'Remote Controller' followed by a dialogue scene and the intro of 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND'. Phonetics for 'Remote Controller' match the (partial) JSON reference; I transcribed the missing verses from audio. Dialogue transcribed directly. 'DIAMOND GIRLFRIEND' JSON lyrics are leftover (song barely started); I transcribed the intro chant. Timestamps tightly wrap vocal bursts.

subtitles.original: カラフルなベルみたいな いつもの顔
subtitles.english: Your usual face, like a colorful bell

subtitles.original: 余裕でしょ
今日はかなり 本気だぜ
ほら すぐ決めて
座る 座る Sit down please
特等席を頭に刺して
subtitles.english: Stick the best seat in your head

subtitles.original: 回る 回る Turn around
ちょっと待って スタンバイ状態

ジャストフィットなリズムを出して
唸り上げる Singing now
あいつよりも高く歌いたい
subtitles.english: I want to sing higher than them

subtitles.original: 惚れた腫れたの七色ザムライ

subtitles.english: A state where misunderstandings are transparent

subtitles.original: 怖いぐらいの枠外状態
subtitles.english: An out-of-the-box state that's almost scary

subtitles.original: 気にしないのがあなたのポリシー
悩んでいてもお腹は減るし
subtitles.english: Even if you're worried, you get hungry

subtitles.original: なんだかんだで世間はヘルシー
おきをたしかに ぬるま湯ダンシン
subtitles.english: Get a grip, lukewarm water dancing

subtitles.original: もうちょっとでスキマ埋まるのに
subtitles.english: Just a little more and the gap will be filled

subtitles.original: どうやってもうまくいかねえ
subtitles.english: No matter what, it doesn't go well

subtitles.original: ああもう時間が足りない
subtitles.english: Ah, there's just not enough time

subtitles.original: Wahoo!
I win!
Nooo!
大丈夫?
あ! コイン! ヤッター!
コインゲット!
Go to the next stage...
But be careful.
次のゲームマスターは僕のようにはいかないぞ
subtitles.english: The next game master won't be as easy as me.

subtitles.original: No easy?
大丈夫だよ! ビブーだから!
Oh, okay.
うん! ありがとう先輩!
じゃあ、バイバイ!
Bye bye!
Wah! There! Whoo!
Now then, where to next, I wonder?
subtitles.english: Now then, where to next, I wonder?

subtitles.original: We've been waiting for you, Biboo!
subtitles.english: We've been waiting for you, Biboo!

subtitles.original: Wow!
IRyS Ninomae Ina'nis Joins the Battle! Driving Battle
subtitles.english: IRyS Ninomae Ina'nis Joins the Battle! Driving Battle

subtitles.original: えっ? アイリス! イナ!
I'm assuming this is what you're looking for, right?
subtitles.english: I'm assuming this is what you're looking for, right?

subtitles.original: Why are you guys so cool?
subtitles.english: Why are you guys so cool?

subtitles.original: Yes, yes! I need that! I need that! Yes! Give it, give it!
subtitles.english: Yes, yes! I need that! I need that! Yes! Give it, give it!

subtitles.original: We won't just hand it over.
subtitles.english: We won't just hand it over.

subtitles.original: You'll have to race us for it.
subtitles.english: You'll have to race us for it.

subtitles.original: Yes.
No way! Give it! Where are you putting that?
subtitles.english: No way! Give it! Where are you putting that?

subtitles.original: I'm putting that back in my pocket.
subtitles.english: I'm putting that back in my pocket.

subtitles.original: Where is it going?
No, if you want it, you have to beat us.
subtitles.english: No, if you want it, you have to beat us.

subtitles.original: Are you ready to battle?
Fine! I'll be cool too, watch this!
subtitles.english: Fine! I'll be cool too, watch this!

subtitles.original: Oh hey! I wumbo, you wumbo!
subtitles.english: Oh hey! I wumbo, you wumbo!

subtitles.original: One, two, three, go! No one can stop us tonight!
